programme.title: Flame on or Flame Out-Naked and Afraid: Last One Standing
programme.desc: Cheeny has a key advantage in a challenge, but her strategy puts her at risk. S03 E08.

programme.title: Three Dog Fight to the Finish-Naked and Afraid: Last One Standing
Outback Trial by Fire-Naked and Afraid: Last One Standing
programme.desc: A legend suffers a third-degree burn and faces immediate elimination. S03 E01.

programme.title: Desert Survivor-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls will have to skin and disembowel a camel in an attempt to stay alive. S02 E02.

programme.title: Desert Survivor-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls will have to skin and disembowel a camel in an attempt to stay alive. S02 E02.

programme.title: Money Pit Payday-Gold Rush
programme.desc: Parker battles to bring in his first Money Pit gold at Dominion Creek. S14 E12.

programme.title: 18 Wheels Across India
programme.desc: A popular Polish lorry driver navigates India's notorious roads and explores the culture.

programme.title: Los Tuxtlas-Dual Survival Colombia
programme.desc: The dense Colombian Amazon rainforest is full of calamities for Felipe and Arnoby. S02 E02.

programme.title: Everglades-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls shows all the skills required to stay alive in the dangerous Everglades. S01 E10.

programme.title: Talking Turkey: Frank Stallone-Man Eats Wild
programme.desc: Mario teams up with Frank Stallone and ventures off to Kansas, searching Eastern turkeys. S02 E08.

programme.title: Backcountry Ice Man: Chuck Liddell-Man Eats Wild
programme.desc: Mario Kalpou's passion leads him to some of the most extreme environments on the planet. S02 E09.

programme.title: 18 Wheels Across India
programme.desc: A popular Polish lorry driver navigates India's notorious roads and explores the culture.

programme.title: African Savannah-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls travels across Kenya to demonstrate how to survive the African savannah. S01 E07.

programme.title: Bears Top 25 Man Moments-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: A survival expert tries to survive the sweltering, crocodile-infested Northern Territory. S05 E02.

programme.title: Blackout-Dual Survival
programme.desc: EJ and Jeff face bears and dark cave in Georgia survival challenge. S09 E05.

programme.title: Inner Mongolia-Ed Stafford's Rite of Passage
programme.desc: Ed participates in the annual rite of passage festival in order to prove his masculinity. S01 E04.

programme.title: Behind the Wild-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: A dedicated team follows Bear Grylls, capturing his struggles and challenges on camera. S05 E07.

programme.title: Hitler's Treasure Hunters
programme.desc: Hitler's Treasure Hunters

programme.title: Downed and Out Part One-Dual Survival
programme.desc: Matt and Joe start at the site of a plane crash off the shore of a tropical island. S05 E03.

programme.title: Desert Survivor-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls will have to skin and disembowel a camel in an attempt to stay alive. S02 E02.

programme.title: Georgiaeastern Europe-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear is in the Caucasus Mountains driving a snowmobile out the back of a helicopter. S05 E03.

programme.title: 18 Wheels Across India
programme.desc: Dawid hitchhikes to Kochi from Bengaluru and later, learns how anglers make a living.

programme.title: Land of the Maori-Man vs. Wild
programme.desc: Bear Grylls navigates treacherous trails in New Zealand's volcanic North Island. S07 E05.

programme.title: Ecuador-Ed Stafford's Rite of Passage
programme.desc: Ed travels to the heart of the Ecuadorian rainforest to live with the Waorani. S01 E05.

programme.title: Edge of Madness-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Two survivalists face the scorching and harsh environment of Guyana's equatorial savannah. S04 E04.

programme.title: Like, Subscribe, Survive-Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Strangers pair up to survive the dangers of the forest, naked and afraid. S19 E03.
